author: Sredder
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed21 minutes agoReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Sredder on21 minutes ago32 minutes agoBiomedhiker1said:The key to whether Iraola will be a success or not will depend on how the players adapt and accept his methods and tactics. There is enough quality in the squad so that should not be a problem. Everyone knows how Iraola works so that is not a secret. This also means that players bought should have a strong work ethic that Iraola demands. My only concern is how the players are going to respond to Iraola's methods. Hopefully, if they are willing to do anything to win, they will embrace Iraola's methods. The senior players in the dressing room will need to lead by example and will be important to Iraola.I wouldn't be worried about Klopp's players. It's the recent signings from last summer I'm concerned about.However I believe they will quickly adapt as they have a strong winning mentality.
